data_note: Solar value analytics. CF and revenue from OpenElectricity API. Capture price and value factor from Aug 2024+ (AEMO MMSDM). Value factor = capture price / pool price — the solar cannibalisation signal. Price band data requires running import_price_band_capture.py --tech solar.
